en: NOGA - General Classification of Economic Activities

The Central Business Names Index (Zefix) contains information and business names of corporate bodies (corporations, corporations with unlimited partners, limited liability companies, co-operatives, non-profit associations and foundations) and public-law corporations registered in the Commercial Register. There are currently forty-five cantonal commercial registers in Switzerland. New entries and changes in the commercial register are published in the Swiss Commercial Gazette (SHAB) in English, French, German and Italian.

Swiss VAT was introduced in 1995. It is known as Mehrwertsteuer (MwSt.); Taxe sur la valeur ajoutée (TVA); Imposta sul valore aggiunto (IVA). While Switzerland is not part of the European Union, its VAT regulations have followed the EU template in terms of all fundamental principles. Revisions were made in 2011.
